description: Create a 6-slide emergency briefing presentation for Hurricane Ian using the source files in ~/Documents/Presentations/ and save it as ~/Documents/Presentations/ian_briefing.pptx. The presentation must include a title slide ('Hurricane Ian Emergency Briefing', subtitle 'Coastal County EMA'), a 'Current Storm Status' slide summarizing the maximum sustained winds, category, and movement from nhc_advisory_22.txt, and a 'Forecast Track' slide with the ian_track_cone.png image. Include a 'Storm Surge Threat' slide with the ian_storm_surge.png image and the expected peak surge for the local area, an 'Evacuation Orders' slide listing the mandatory evacuation zones from county_response_plan.txt, and a 'Shelter Operations' slide listing the open shelters from the response plan. On the 'Shelter Operations' slide, add the speaker note: 'Remind commissioners that law enforcement cannot respond to rescue calls once sustained winds exceed 45 mph.'.
